case_title: DAVID ANDREW PHILLIPS VS. PETER T FERENBACH

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2019 - CONTINUED TO JUL-10-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 FOR PLAINTIFF TO AMEND HIS COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT PETER FERENBACH WAIVES SERVICE ON THE AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PRODUCE ALL RECORDS IDENTIFYING THE PERSON WHO PAID $1000 FOR DEFENDANT'S VEHICLE. THE RECORDS ARE TO BE DELIVERED TO PLAINTIFF AND A COPY SENT TO THE COURT. CRAIGSLIST SUBPOENAED DOCUMENTS IN FILE. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO JY FIRM - CRAIGSLIST AGENT OF SERVICE, THE RUSS BUILGING 235 MONTGOMERY STREET SU. 1158 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94104
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR MORE EVIDENCE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,230.00 FILED BY PHILLIPS, DAVID ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT FERENBACH, PETER T ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-28-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-11-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
FILED ORIGINAL SUBPOENA ISSUED TO CRAIG'SLIST. FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHILLIPS, DAVID ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT FERENBACH, PETER T

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-31-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-31-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF DAVID ANDREW PHILLIPS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PTER T. FEREBACH IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $100.00 - SERVED FEB-24-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FERENBACH, PETER T
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-31-2019 - JUDGMENT.
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO CRAIGSLIST 222 SUTTER STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94108

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-10-2019 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO JUL-31-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506, PLAINTIFF DAVID ANDREW PHILLIPS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PTER FERENBACH IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED (INITIALLY). DEFENDANT WAS UNABLE TO SUPPLY THE COURT WITH WHAT WAS ORDERED AND PLAINTIFF DID NOT AMEND CLAIM. PARTIES DID NOT STIPULATE FOR JUDGE PRO TEM AND REQUEST MORE TIME TO COLLECT ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. JUDGE PRO TEM ANNE WONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PHILLIPS, DAVID ANDREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FERENBACH, PETER T $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $560.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT FERENBACH, PETER T
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO C.A. DMV LEGAL AFFAIRS DIVISION, LEGAL OFFICE THIRD FLOOR 2415 FIRST AVE. SACRAMENTO, CA. 954818
